name: instrument
description: Proactive logging skill - add comprehensive console.logs whenever building, implementing, or updating any code element. Includes database schema reference.
capabilities: Add logs to server actions on first write
Add logs to React components on first write
Add logs to Supabase queries on first write
Add logs to form handlers on first write
Add logs to auth checks on first write
RLS policy violation detection (EXPLICIT and SILENT)
Database schema validation before writing code

references.description: Always check this file before writing database code to ensure correct table names, column names, and relationships

philosophy: Log everything upfront. Never debug blind. Check database schema first. Logs are permanent infrastructure.
rules: ALWAYS check DATABASE-REFERENCE.md before writing database code
ALWAYS add logs on first implementation
RLS gets special logging (EXPLICIT and SILENT)
AFTER RLS migration: Export and update RLS-list.md
Verify: Actual DB = Scheme File = Reference File = RLS List

steps.action: Add comprehensive console.logs at all critical points
Log all inputs, outputs, and errors
